prompts.name: Round Glasses
prompts.text: Add thin round glasses that frame the face clearly and give the subject an intelligent, gentle look.

prompts.name: Sunglasses
prompts.text: Add stylish sunglasses with clean reflections and a confident modern appearance.

prompts.name: Choker
prompts.text: Add a tasteful choker around the neck, using simple clean design or subtle decorative detail.

prompts.name: Pendant Necklace
prompts.text: Add a delicate pendant necklace with subtle metallic detail and natural placement.

prompts.name: Earrings
prompts.text: Add elegant earrings that complement the subject without overpowering the design.

prompts.name: Hair Ornament
prompts.text: Add decorative hair ornaments or hairpins that sit naturally in the hairstyle.

prompts.name: Ribbon
prompts.text: Add a ribbon accessory with soft fabric folds and a neat, charming presentation.

prompts.name: Hat
prompts.text: Add a stylish hat that fits naturally on the head and complements the outfit.

prompts.name: Scarf
prompts.text: Add a soft scarf wrapped naturally around the neck with believable folds.

prompts.name: Backpack
prompts.text: Add a practical backpack with straps, pockets, and realistic weight placement.

prompts.name: Shoulder Bag
prompts.text: Add a shoulder bag or handbag with clean design, natural strap placement, and realistic material.

prompts.name: Gloves
prompts.text: Add fitted gloves with clear finger structure and believable fabric or leather texture.

prompts.name: Belt
prompts.text: Add a belt that fits naturally around the waist with visible buckle and material detail.

prompts.name: Flower Crown
prompts.text: Add a delicate flower crown with balanced placement and natural floral detail.

prompts.name: Headphones
prompts.text: Add modern headphones with clean shape, realistic fit, and subtle tech styling.
